title: Fix button backgrounds and update version to 0.4.151

requirements.text: Fix the Upload Files button so it has a solid light blue background (#eff6ff) with no colored border (use a neutral/default border or no border). Fix the New Folder and Upload Folder buttons so they have a solid light yellow background (#fefce8) with no colored border. These styles must apply in both light and dark modes — do not let dark mode override or remove the background fills.

quotes: Upload Files should have the light blue (#eff6ff) and New Folder/Upload Folder the light yellow (#fefce8), with no colored borders
the buttons still have colored borders and the background colors aren't right

acceptanceCriteria: Upload Files button renders with a filled #eff6ff background and no blue/colored border
New Folder button renders with a filled #fefce8 background and no yellow/colored border
Upload Folder button renders with a filled #fefce8 background and no yellow/colored border
Background fills are visible in both light and dark themes

requirements.text: Update the APP_VERSION constant in frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts from its current value to '0.4.151'.

constraints: Do not modify any immutable frontend paths
Do not change backend logic or data models
nonGoals: Redesigning any other UI elements beyond the three action buttons
Adding new features or changing functionality
